tiller_count.description: Mature tiller count in the clump.
tiller_count.title: Tiller Count

tiller_height_range.description: Min and max flowering-tiller height in declared length units.
tiller_height_range.title: Tiller Height Range

fraction_flowering.description: Fraction of tillers that flower (0..1). Andropogon mature: ~0.3.
fraction_flowering.title: Fraction Flowering

vegetative_height_fraction.description: Vegetative tiller height as a fraction of flowering tiller height.
vegetative_height_fraction.title: Vegetative Height Fraction

queryable.description: Persistent-marker pattern for the Clump module.
queryable.title: Queryable

CustomLengthUnit.description:
Inline definition of a length unit the species YAML wants to use.

Example:
    units:
      length:
        name: foo_units
        meters_per_unit: 0.42

meters_per_unit.description: Conversion factor: 1 unit = N meters. Must be > 0.
meters_per_unit.title: Meters Per Unit

CustomLengthUnit.title: CustomLengthUnit

primary.description: Primary habitat associations (e.g. mesic_prairie, oak_savanna). At least one required.
primary.title: Primary

cc_value.description: Coefficient of Conservatism, 0-10 (Wilhelm 2017). Higher = more conservative / habitat-specialist.
cc_value.title: Cc Value

diameter.description: Min and max inflorescence diameter in declared length units.
diameter.title: Diameter

ray_count_range.description: Min and max number of ray florets (composite heads).
ray_count_range.title: Ray Count Range

ray_droop.description: True if ray florets droop downward (e.g. Echinacea, Rudbeckia).
ray_droop.title: Ray Droop

ray_material_id.description: Material library id for ray florets.
ray_material_id.title: Ray Material Id

disk_material_id.description: Material library id for the central disk.
disk_material_id.title: Disk Material Id

MaterialForm.description: Plant material form for procurement. Canonical enum; F43.
MaterialForm.title: MaterialForm

MaterialMeta.description: Plant material form metadata per species (F43).

allowed_forms.description: Material forms this species supports (e.g. seed, plug, container_1gal). At least one.
allowed_forms.title: Allowed Forms

default_form.description: Default form for BOM rows. Must be one of allowed_forms.

MaterialMeta.title: MaterialMeta

OriginRange.description: Lat/lon bounding box for a species' native origin.

lat.description: Latitude range [min, max] in WGS84 degrees, -90..90.
lat.title: Lat

lon.description: Longitude range [min, max] in WGS84 degrees, -180..180.
lon.title: Lon

OriginRange.title: OriginRange

raceme_count_range.description: Min and max racemes per panicle ('turkey foot' for Andropogon: 2-5).
raceme_count_range.title: Raceme Count Range

raceme_length.description: Raceme length in declared length units.
raceme_length.title: Raceme Length

raceme_divergence_deg.description: Angle from culm vertical at which racemes diverge.
raceme_divergence_deg.title: Raceme Divergence Deg

material_id.description: Material library id for the panicle.
material_id.title: Material Id

senescence_onset_doy.description: Day-of-year when senescence begins (color change, leaf decline).
senescence_onset_doy.title: Senescence Onset Doy

abscission_doy.description: Day-of-year when leaves drop / above-ground biomass dies back.
abscission_doy.title: Abscission Doy

inflorescence_emerge_doy.description: Day-of-year when inflorescence first appears. Optional for non-flowering archetypes.
inflorescence_emerge_doy.title: Inflorescence Emerge Doy

inflorescence_persist_winter.description: True if dried inflorescence remains visible into winter (e.g. Echinacea cones).
inflorescence_persist_winter.title: Inflorescence Persist Winter

culm_persist_winter.description: True if grass culm/stem remains standing into winter (e.g. Andropogon, Sorghastrum).
culm_persist_winter.title: Culm Persist Winter

fruit_persist.description: True if fruits remain on the plant beyond seed dispersal.
fruit_persist.title: Fruit Persist

ecoregion.description: Ecoregion code: Bailey or EPA Level III/IV (e.g. 'EPA_L3_54').
ecoregion.title: Ecoregion

origin_range.description: Optional lat/lon bounding box of the species' native origin range.

leaf_count_range.description: Min and max number of basal leaves in the rosette. Stochastic per specimen.
leaf_count_range.title: Leaf Count Range

leaf_template.description: Leaf shape template id (e.g. lanceolate, lanceolate_serrate, ovate).
leaf_template.title: Leaf Template

leaf_length_range.description: Min and max blade length in the species' declared length unit. Stochastic per specimen.
leaf_length_range.title: Leaf Length Range

petiole_length_range.description: Optional min and max petiole length in declared length units. Omit for sessile leaves.
petiole_length_range.title: Petiole Length Range

phyllotaxis.description: Leaf arrangement: spiral, distichous (alternate 180), opposite, whorled.

divergence_angle_deg.description: Phyllotaxy divergence angle in degrees. 137.5 = golden angle (most spirals).
divergence_angle_deg.title: Divergence Angle Deg

queryable.description: If true, codegen injects the persistent-marker pattern so RosetteLeaf modules survive in the lstring as queryable markers.
queryable.title: Queryable

material_id.description: Material library id used for rosette leaves. See materials/library.json.
material_id.title: Material Id

count_range.description: Min and max number of scapes per specimen.
count_range.title: Count Range

height_range.description: Min and max scape height in declared length units.
height_range.title: Height Range

leaf_count_on_scape.description: Min and max cauline leaves on scape (0 if scape is leafless).
leaf_count_on_scape.title: Leaf Count On Scape

material_id.description: Material library id used for the scape stem.
material_id.title: Material Id

leaf_count_range.description: Min and max leaves per tiller. Stochastic per tiller.
leaf_count_range.title: Leaf Count Range

queryable.description: Persistent-marker pattern for Tiller modules so each is queryable.
queryable.title: Queryable

leaf_material_id.description: Material library id for grass blades.
leaf_material_id.title: Leaf Material Id

culm_material_id.description: Material library id for the culm.
culm_material_id.title: Culm Material Id

UnitSystem.description:
Per-species unit declaration.

Default is imperial inches, matching the USA-centric reference YAMLs
in the design doc. Override per species.

length.description: Length unit used for all length-typed fields in this species YAML.
length.title: Length

UnitSystem.title: UnitSystem

description: A single species archetype + parameters. The contributor surface.

archetype.description: Morphological archetype that selects the .lpy template. Phase 0 supports: rosette_scape_composite, tiller_clump.
archetype.title: Archetype

units.description: Unit system for length values in this YAML. Default: imperial inches.

height_range.description: Mature plant height range in declared length units.
height_range.title: Height Range

crown_width.description: Mature crown width range in declared length units.
crown_width.title: Crown Width

references.description: Bibliographic references supporting the parameter values.
references.title: References

parameters.description: Archetype-specific parameter block. Schema dispatched on `archetype`.
parameters.title: Parameters

material.description: Plant material form metadata (allowed forms + default form). F43.

grade.description: Use-case grade(s): restoration_grade, ornamental_grade, or both. F44.
grade.title: Grade

provenance.description: Provenance: ecoregion code plus optional origin lat/lon range. F45.

template_override.description: Optional escape hatch: relative path to a custom .lpy.j2 template to use instead of the archetype default. Use only when the standard archetype template doesn't fit. Most species leave this null.
template_override.title: Template Override

title: Species
